title: Drill
description: A single drill card for vocabulary, formula, or concept-application practice

mode.description: Drill interaction mode. Always prompts with the longer/descriptive side; student types the short exact answer. concept_mc is multiple choice. name_to_formula prompts with formula name; student types it using simple notation.

prompt.description: What is shown to the student (definition, significance, formula name, or MC question). For concept_mc: 1-3 sentence scenario or question. Never reveals the answer.

answer.description: Canonical correct answer — one per card, no alternates. For concept_mc: omit (use choices[].is_correct). For name_to_formula: KaTeX string of the canonical formula.

is_key_term.description: True if this card is a high-yield key term the study guide should display. Only applies to typed-recall modes (definition_to_term, significance_to_person, significance_to_event, significance_to_case, name_to_formula). Always false for concept_mc. Mark 8-15 cards per unit as true.

group.description: Region/empire/theme label used to group cards in the browse view (e.g. 'East Asia', 'Islamic World'). Optional. Cards without a group are rendered under an 'Other' section.

katex_required.description: True if the answer must be rendered in KaTeX (name_to_formula cards)

format_hint.description: Short hint shown above input for name_to_formula cards with unusual notation. e.g. 'Use Delta for Δ'. Optional.

choices.description: Required for concept_mc mode only. Array of 3-4 answer choices.

is_correct.description: Exactly one choice must be true

explanation.description: Why this choice is correct or incorrect — must name the specific misconception for distractors

accepted_answers.description: Optional per-card accepted alternates (abbreviations, aliases) beyond what auto-normalization handles. Each string is treated identically to the canonical answer by fuzzyMatch.
